supersedes.note: v1.0 manifest remains valid against git-snapshotted file at ceremony_commit; v1.1 amendment appends Appendix A reconciling §3.1 byte-layout drift against codec.py oracle without modifying v1.0 lines 1-553.

verification_procedure: 1. Read VBDIP-0006 from proposal_path at this commit
2. Compute SHA-256 of file bytes; must equal proposal_canonical_hash
3. Load architect_pubkey_ed25519 (hex -> 32 bytes raw Ed25519 pubkey)
6. Confirm architect_pubkey_ed25519 matches the value in bridge_wallet_attestation_ref envelope
7. Re-verify the bridge wallet EIP-191 signature in the attestation references back to 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692
8. Optionally verify v1.0 manifest at supersedes.manifest_path still validates against git show <supersedes.ceremony_commit>:<proposal_path>
